trans-unit.source: Could not load item details. Please try again later.
trans-unit.target: Gegenstandsdetails konnten nicht geladen werden. Bitte versuche es später erneut.

trans-unit.source: Could not load search results. Please try again later.
trans-unit.target: Suchergebnisse konnten nicht geladen werden. Bitte versuche es später erneut.

trans-unit.source: Could not load filter definitions. Please try again later.
trans-unit.target: Filterdefinitionen konnten nicht geladen werden. Bitte versuche es später erneut.

trans-unit.source: Password must be at least 8 characters
trans-unit.target: Das Passwort muss mindestens 8 Zeichen lang sein

trans-unit.source: Password must include a lowercase letter
trans-unit.target: Das Passwort muss einen Kleinbuchstaben enthalten

trans-unit.source: Password must include an uppercase letter
trans-unit.target: Das Passwort muss einen Großbuchstaben enthalten
Das Passwort muss eine Zahl enthalten
Das Passwort muss ein Symbol enthalten

trans-unit.source: Sign in or create an account to unlock protected auction tools.
trans-unit.target: Melde dich an oder erstelle ein Konto, um geschützte Auktionstools freizuschalten.

trans-unit.source: Enter the confirmation code sent to your email.
trans-unit.target: Gib den Bestätigungscode ein, der an deine E-Mail gesendet wurde.

trans-unit.source: If an account exists for this email, a password reset code has been sent.
trans-unit.target: Falls ein Konto für diese E-Mail existiert, wurde ein Rücksetzcode gesendet.

trans-unit.source: Password reset. Sign in with your new password.
trans-unit.target: Passwort zurückgesetzt. Melde dich mit deinem neuen Passwort an.

trans-unit.source: Unable to complete the request. Please try again.
trans-unit.target: Die Anfrage konnte nicht abgeschlossen werden. Bitte versuche es erneut.

trans-unit.source: Could not load this item. Try again from the market browser.
trans-unit.target: Dieser Gegenstand konnte nicht geladen werden. Versuche es erneut im Marktbrowser.

trans-unit.source: Average quantity per hour as bars; buyout spread and average as lines.
trans-unit.target: Average quantity per hour as bars; buyout spread and average as lines.

trans-unit.source: Listed quantity per hour over 14 days as bars; buyout spread and average as lines.
trans-unit.target: Listed quantity per hour over 14 days as bars; buyout spread and average as lines.

trans-unit.source: Average market unit price by day and hour.
trans-unit.target: Average market unit price by day and hour.

trans-unit.source: No current listings for this item.
trans-unit.target: No current listings for this item.

trans-unit.source: Profit hidden until all reagents have prices.
trans-unit.target: Gewinn wird ausgeblendet, bis alle Reagenzien Preise haben.

trans-unit.source: Daily profit and ROI for selected recipe. Missing points mean incomplete pricing.
trans-unit.target: Daily profit and ROI for selected recipe. Missing points mean incomplete pricing.

trans-unit.source: Average profit by day and hour for selected recipe.
trans-unit.target: Average profit by day and hour for selected recipe.

trans-unit.source: Choose a realm to begin browsing its auction house.
trans-unit.target: Wähle einen Realm, um sein Auktionshaus zu durchsuchen.

trans-unit.source: Search by realm name, slug, or region
trans-unit.target: Nach Realmname, Slug oder Region suchen
Keine Realms passen zu deiner Suche.

trans-unit.source: Could not load realm list. Please try again later.
trans-unit.target: Realm-Liste konnte nicht geladen werden. Bitte versuche es später erneut.

trans-unit.source: Unable to compare item with Blizzard API.
trans-unit.target: Unable to compare item with Blizzard API.

trans-unit.source: English (US) or English (GB) name is required.
trans-unit.target: English (US) or English (GB) name is required.

trans-unit.source: Delete this item override? Base item data will be inherited again.
trans-unit.target: Delete this item override? Base item data will be inherited again.

trans-unit.source: Class ID and subclass ID are required together.
trans-unit.target: Class ID and subclass ID are required together.

trans-unit.source: Unable to compare recipe with Blizzard API.
trans-unit.target: Unable to compare recipe with Blizzard API.

trans-unit.source: Search effective recipe rows and manage admin overrides that survive Blizzard sync.
trans-unit.target: Search effective recipe rows and manage admin overrides that survive Blizzard sync.

trans-unit.source: No recipes match the current filters.
trans-unit.target: No recipes match the current filters.

trans-unit.source: Run compare to inspect Blizzard API differences.
trans-unit.target: Run compare to inspect Blizzard API differences.

trans-unit.source: No output overrides. The base crafted item is inherited.
trans-unit.target: No output overrides. The base crafted item is inherited.

trans-unit.source: No reagent overrides. Base reagents are inherited.
trans-unit.target: No reagent overrides. Base reagents are inherited.

trans-unit.source: Compare the local recipe data with the current Blizzard API response.
trans-unit.target: Compare the local recipe data with the current Blizzard API response.

trans-unit.source: Remove this recipe override and inherit base recipe data again.
trans-unit.target: Remove this recipe override and inherit base recipe data again.

trans-unit.source: Delete this recipe override? Base recipe data will be inherited again.
trans-unit.target: Delete this recipe override? Base recipe data will be inherited again.

trans-unit.source: Search items by name or ID
trans-unit.target: Gegenstände nach Name oder ID suchen

trans-unit.source: Start an asynchronous sync of professions, skill tiers, recipes, and reagents.
trans-unit.target: Starten Sie eine asynchrone Synchronisierung von Berufen, Fertigkeitsstufen, Rezepten und Reagenzien.

trans-unit.source: A profession sync is already running.
Unable to start the profession sync.
trans-unit.target: Die Berufssynchronisierung konnte nicht gestartet werden.

trans-unit.source: You can continue browsing recipes while it finishes.
trans-unit.target: Sie können weiterhin Rezepte durchsuchen, während die Synchronisierung abgeschlossen wird.

trans-unit.source: The profession sync could not be completed.
trans-unit.target: Die Berufssynchronisierung konnte nicht abgeschlossen werden.

trans-unit.source: Unable to monitor the admin job. You can try starting it again.
trans-unit.target: Die Überwachung des Admin-Jobs ist nicht möglich. Du kannst versuchen, ihn erneut zu starten.

trans-unit.source: Crafting rules are unavailable; ranking is heuristic.
trans-unit.target: Crafting rules are unavailable; ranking is heuristic.

trans-unit.source: Heuristic best crafter: {$INTERPOLATION}. Crafting rules are unavailable.
trans-unit.target: Heuristic best crafter: {$INTERPOLATION}. Crafting rules are unavailable.

trans-unit.source: Configure your characters’ crafting skill trees.
trans-unit.target: Configure your characters’ crafting skill trees.

trans-unit.source: Add the characters whose profession builds you want to compare.
trans-unit.target: Add the characters whose profession builds you want to compare.

trans-unit.source: Choose a profession and record its ranks. Changes are saved per character.
trans-unit.target: Choose a profession and record its ranks. Changes are saved per character.

trans-unit.source: Add a character to configure a profession profile.
trans-unit.target: Add a character to configure a profession profile.

trans-unit.source: No imported tree is available for this profession yet. Importing is not available from this page.
trans-unit.target: No imported tree is available for this profession yet. Importing is not available from this page.

trans-unit.source: Enter a region, realm, and character name.
trans-unit.target: Enter a region, realm, and character name.

trans-unit.source: Unable to add this character. Check the details and try again.
trans-unit.target: Unable to add this character. Check the details and try again.

trans-unit.source: Unable to save your skill-tree profile. Your edits are still here.
trans-unit.target: Unable to save your skill-tree profile. Your edits are still here.

trans-unit.source: Unable to load this profession profile.
trans-unit.target: Unable to load this profession profile.
